blocks.body: A three-year arts degree in a subject such as Economics, Political Science, History, Psychology, English or Sociology. It builds reading, writing and analysis, and is a classic base for civil services, media, law, social work and management.

items.label: Annual graduates
items.source: AISHE (BA is the largest stream), approx.

blocks.title: How you get in
blocks.body: 10+2 in any stream on merit, or a university entrance test (e.g. CUET).

blocks.title: At a glance
items: The most common degree among UPSC Civil Services aspirants.
Economics and Psychology open analyst, research and HR routes.
A master's, LLB, journalism or an MBA are common next steps.
